title: Respect Procedural/Non-procedural Regions when Unwinding Inlined, Long Line Expressions

features.name: long_named_wire_in_procedural_block
features.description: Code should include a wire with a very long identifier name (exceeding typical line length limits) that is read and used within an always_ff procedural block via sv.passign

features.name: procedural_region_uninlining_expression_emission
features.description: Code should include an expression emission scenario where a value defined in a non-procedural region gets used in a procedural region and requires uninlining due to line length

features.name: automatic_logic_temporary_in_procedural_block
features.description: Code should include an always_ff block that references wire values which need to be extracted to automatic logic temporaries due to long line unwinding
